home.case.label: Featured project
home.case.title: Brake System Components
home.case.body1: Precision-turned and milled components for commercial-vehicle braking systems, delivered in series volumes with zero-defect targets. Full quality chain — from CMM inspection through coordinated heat treatment — managed end-to-end by Borela.
home.case.body2: Sustained partnership through multiple platform cycles; recognised as Supplier of the Year 2009.
home.faq.label: Frequently asked questions
home.faq.0.q: What is Borela's core manufacturing capability?
home.faq.0.a: Borela specialises in precision CNC turning and milling for series production. We operate 40 CNC lathes (Ø1–90 mm bar capacity, Y-axis) and 6 machining centers, producing 500–100,000 pieces per order at ±0.01 mm tolerance. Heat treatment, press work, TIG welding and assembly are also available as part of a fully managed supply.
home.faq.1.a: Our primary markets are automotive and commercial vehicle OEM supply chains (Tier 1 / Tier 2), power tools, sealing technology and general engineering. We are VDA 6.3 process-audited and ISO 9001:2015 certified, which satisfies most automotive supplier qualification requirements.
home.faq.2.q: How do I request a quote?
home.faq.2.a: Use the Request a Quote form on this site. Upload your drawing (STEP, IGES or PDF) and specify batch size, material and target delivery. An engineer will reply within 2 business days — not an auto-responder. If you prefer direct contact: rfq@borela.eu or +36 76 569 122.
home.faq.3.q: What series sizes do you quote?
home.faq.3.a: Our production sweet spot is 500 to 100,000 pieces per delivery. We also quote prototypes and first-article samples as a preparatory stage before series commitment.
home.cta.label: Get in touch
home.cta.heading: Ready to discuss your project?
home.cta.subheading: Send us your technical drawings for a rapid, precise quotation.
home.cta.actions.0.label: Request a Quote
home.cta.actions.1.label: Contact us
home.worldmap.heading: A global supply footprint
home.worldmap.lead: From a single plant in Hungary, Borela BT. supplies precision-machined components to leading manufacturers across Europe, Asia and South America.

services.faq.label: Frequently asked questions
services.faq.0.q: What CNC machining processes does Borela offer?
services.faq.0.a: CNC turning (40 lathes, Ø1–90 mm, multi-axis with Y-axis), CNC milling (6 machining centers, 3- and 4-axis), press work, prototyping, TIG welding, sub-assembly and 3D measurement & QC. Heat treatment is coordinated via a certified partner.
services.faq.1.a: Steel (C45, 42CrMo4, 16MnCr5), aluminium (EN AW-6082, 7075), stainless steel (304, 316L), brass and copper alloys, and cast iron/nodular iron. Material certification is included as standard.
services.faq.2.a: Yes. Borela can supply sub-assemblies combining CNC-machined, pressed and sourced components — fully inspected and packed to your specification. This simplifies your supply chain to a single purchase order.
services.faq.3.q: How do you ensure part quality?
services.faq.3.a: Our ISO 9001:2015 quality system requires first article inspection, in-process statistical measurement, CMM dimensional reports and material traceability on every order. VDA 6.3 process audit compliance is maintained for automotive customers.

capabilities.hero.heading: What we can build for you
capabilities.hero.lead: Machines, materials and measurement under one roof: 40 CNC lathes, 6 machining centers, in-house CMM, ISO 9001 and VDA 6.3 audited. Everything required for series production of precision machined parts.

capabilities.overview.label: Overview
capabilities.overview.body: Borela operates a fully integrated CNC machining facility in central Hungary, producing precision turned and milled components for automotive Tier 1/2, power tool and engineering OEM customers. All operations — from raw material receipt to final inspection and CMM measurement — are performed at our own sites under ISO 9001:2015 quality control.

capabilities.measurement.body: Our ISO 9001-controlled measurement room houses a coordinate measuring machine (CMM), contour measuring instrument and micro-hardness tester. Every order ships with a dimensional measurement report.

capabilities.faq.label: Frequently asked questions
capabilities.faq.0.q: Can you handle our production volume?
capabilities.faq.0.a: Our installed capacity covers 500 to 100,000 pieces per delivery on CNC turning and milling. We run two shifts at our primary Jakabszállás plant and can flex capacity via our secondary Fülöpszállás site.
capabilities.faq.1.q: What tolerances can you actually hold on a production run?
capabilities.faq.1.a: For standard CNC turning and milling, we hold ±0.05 mm without special measures. For precision work with in-process gauging we achieve ±0.01 mm consistently in series. Tighter tolerances (±0.005 mm) are achievable on specific features with cylindrical grinding — discuss with our engineers.
capabilities.faq.2.q: Are you certified for Tier 1 / Tier 2 automotive supply?
capabilities.faq.2.a: Yes. Borela holds ISO 9001:2015 (since 1996), ISO 14001:2015 (since 2005) and VDA 6.3 process audit certification (since 2016). We have been a Knorr-Bremse Preferred Supplier since 2007 and supply Mercedes-Benz Manufacturing Hungary.
capabilities.faq.3.q: Do you provide measurement certificates with each delivery?
capabilities.faq.3.a: Yes. Our in-house CMM and measurement room produces dimensional measurement reports (CPK/PPK) and material certificates with every delivery. First Article Inspection reports are standard for new part introductions.
capabilities.faq.4.q: Can you manage heat treatment as part of the order?
capabilities.faq.4.a: Yes. Heat treatment (case hardening, induction hardening, annealing) is coordinated via a certified professional partner near our facility. It is included in your quote as a fully managed service — you deal with Borela, not with the partner. This adds approximately 1–2 weeks to standard lead time.
capabilities.cta.heading: Ready to test our capabilities?
capabilities.cta.subheading: Send us your drawing and get a detailed technical quote within 2 business days.

capabilities.cta.action.1.label: Contact us

industries.section.05.label: Certifications by industry
industries.section.06.label: Frequently asked questions
industries.faq.0.q: What automotive standards do you comply with?
industries.faq.0.a: ISO 9001:2015 and VDA 6.3 process audit. We have been a Knorr-Bremse Preferred Supplier since 2007 and supply Mercedes-Benz Manufacturing Hungary. PPAP documentation is available on request.
industries.faq.1.q: Can you supply under a long-term supply agreement (LTA)?
industries.faq.1.a: Yes. We run multi-year LTAs with several OEM customers. Fixed pricing, dedicated capacity allocation and monthly call-off scheduling are all standard commercial frameworks for us.
industries.faq.2.q: Do you have experience with low-volume, high-mix orders?
industries.faq.2.a: Yes. Our CNC turning and milling centers can be set up for short runs and high-mix production, with full first article inspection and quick changeover. Minimum order quantities start at 500 pieces for standard series and lower for prototypes.

references.faq.1.q: Has Borela won any supplier recognition awards?
references.faq.1.a: Yes. Knorr-Bremse Preferred Supplier Award (2007, renewed 2009). Az Év Vállalkozása (Hungarian Entrepreneur of the Year) recognition in 2010. VDA 6.3 process audit first passed in 2016.
references.faq.2.q: How long has Borela been supplying tier-1 automotive customers?
references.faq.2.a: Since 2007 for Knorr-Bremse. Our ISO 9001 certification dates to 1996, giving us 28+ years of documented quality system operation.

about.hero.label: About
about.hero.heading: A precision Hungarian engineering family business
about.hero.lead: Engineering heritage since 1953. Three generations, one family, one standard: Western-European quality at Eastern-European cost.
about.whoWeAre.label: Who we are
about.whoWeAre.paragraph: Borela BT. is a family-owned precision CNC machining company in Izsák, Hungary — in the heart of the EU. Founded in 1953, we deliver Western-European quality (ISO 9001, VDA 6.3) at Eastern-European cost, with 50 employees and 5,000 m² of production floor.
about.whoWeAre.quote: “A family-owned Hungarian precision machining partner in the heart of the EU, delivering Western-European quality at Eastern-European cost — with 70+ years of engineering heritage.”
about.numbers.label: By the numbers
about.stats.0.label: Engineering heritage since
about.stats.1.label: Employees
about.stats.2.label: CNC lathes
about.stats.3.label: Pieces per order
about.leadership.label: Leadership
about.leadership.intro: Borela BT. is now run by its second generation. After the passing of Rezső Bognár in 2021 and the retirement of Béla Bognár soon after, the founders stepped back from daily operations. Béla’s two children — Anita and Péter Bognár — now lead the company, each returning to the family firm with more than a decade of automotive quality experience.
about.leadership.0.bio: Anita started as a quality assistant at General Electric, then held quality-management roles at Hidria Bausch and Continental Automotive Hungary. She joined Borela BT. six years ago to lead the family business into its second generation.
about.leadership.1.bio: Péter began in a management role at a smaller engineering company, then worked as a quality engineer at Mercedes-Benz Manufacturing Hungary. He joined Borela BT. five years ago, bringing automotive-grade quality discipline to the family firm.
about.story.label: Our story
about.timeline.1953.event: Engineering heritage begins — Bognár Lajos founds a precision machine workshop in Izsák, Hungary.
about.timeline.1990.event: Borela BT. formally established. CNC machining expansion begins.
about.timeline.1996.event: ISO 9001 quality management certification achieved — one of the first Hungarian precision machining SMEs.
about.timeline.2007.event: Knorr-Bremse Product Safety Audit passed first-time. Preferred Supplier status awarded.
about.timeline.2008.event: Fülöpszállás secondary plant opens — 2,000 m² additional capacity.
about.timeline.2010.event: Az Év Vállalkozása — Hungarian Entrepreneur of the Year recognition.
about.timeline.2016.event: VDA 6.3 process audit certification — meeting DACH automotive procurement standard.
about.timeline.2020s.event: New production hall at Jakabszállás. Heat treatment formally moved to coordinated specialist partner.
about.timeline.today.event: 50 employees, 40 CNC lathes, 6 machining centers, 5,000 m² across three sites.
about.keyPeople.label: Key people
about.keyPeople.intro: The leadership is backed by an experienced core team. Individual names and profiles will follow.
about.keyPeople.0.note: Runs day-to-day production across our machining sites.
about.keyPeople.1.note: Your single point of contact for quotes, orders and delivery.
about.keyPeople.2.note: Plans series production schedules and shop-floor capacity.
about.certifications.label: Credentials & recognition
about.certifications.0.scope: Quality Management System — precision machining and manufacturing
about.trust.label: Who trusts us
about.faq.label: Frequently asked questions
about.faq.0.q: How long has Borela been operating?
about.faq.0.a: Borela's engineering heritage goes back to a machine workshop founded in 1953. The company has held ISO 9001 certification since 1996 and has served automotive and engineering OEMs across Europe for decades.
about.faq.1.a: Yes. Borela is family-owned and engineering-led — the same family and the same engineering culture have run the company throughout its history.
about.faq.2.a: Borela operates three sites in central Hungary: headquarters in Izsák, the primary machining and pressing plant in Jakabszállás (3,000 m²), and a secondary machining plant in Fülöpszállás (2,000 m²).
about.faq.3.q: How many people work at Borela?
about.faq.3.a: Around 50 people across three sites, operating 40 CNC lathes and 6 machining centers.
about.cta.heading: Ready to work with Borela?
about.cta.subheading: Tell us about your project. An engineer will reply within 2 business days.

contact.hero.heading: Contact Borela
contact.hero.lead: Reach our sales and engineering team directly. English and German spoken. All enquiries reviewed by an engineer.
contact.hero.actions.0.label: Request a Quote
contact.form.intro.rfq: For technical enquiries and RFQ submissions, use the Request a Quote form — it routes your message directly to our engineering team and lets you attach drawings.
contact.form.intro.general: For general questions, use the details below or fill in this form. We respond in English, German and Hungarian.
contact.contact.phone.label: Phone
contact.contact.email.label: Email
contact.departments.0.name: Sales team
contact.departments.1.name: Engineering team
contact.departments.2.name: Administration
contact.location.heading: In the heart of Hungary's automotive region
contact.location.lead: Our plant sits in Jakabszállás, in central Hungary — just 15 km from Kecskemét and the Mercedes-Benz factory, and 10 km from the M5 motorway. That means fast, reliable road access for deliveries across the EU.
contact.location.bullets.0: 15 km to Kecskemét & the Mercedes-Benz plant
contact.location.bullets.2: Direct EU road links — no customs, no tariffs
contact.location.map.title: Borela BT. location — Jakabszállás, Hungary
contact.faq.0.q: What is the fastest way to get a quote?
contact.faq.0.a: Use the Request a Quote form at borela.eu/rfq/ — upload your drawing and fill in batch size and material. An engineer will reply within 2 business days. For urgent inquiries, call +36 76 569 122 directly.
contact.faq.1.q: Do you visit customers in Germany and Austria?
contact.faq.1.a: Yes. Our sales team makes regular visits to DACH-region customers. Contact us to schedule an appointment: rfq@borela.eu.
contact.faq.2.q: Which languages does Borela communicate in?
contact.faq.2.a: English, German and Hungarian. All technical and commercial correspondence is available in these three languages.
contact.cta.heading: Have a drawing ready?
contact.cta.subheading: Skip the contact form — submit it directly via our RFQ page and get a precise quote within 2 business days.
contact.cta.actions.0.label: Request a Quote

rfq.hero.label: Request a Quote
rfq.hero.heading: Request a Quote
rfq.hero.lead: Upload your drawing and get a meaningful answer within 2 business days — reviewed by an engineer, not an auto-responder.
rfq.hero.stat.0.label: Response time
rfq.hero.stat.1.label: Drawing required
rfq.hero.stat.2.label: NDA available
rfq.prepare.label: How it works
rfq.prepare.cards.0.title: Drawing review
rfq.prepare.cards.0.desc: We check manufacturability, tolerances and material spec. We flag issues before quoting.
rfq.prepare.cards.1.title: Quote within 2 days
rfq.prepare.cards.1.desc: A detailed price, lead time and FAI plan — reviewed by an engineer, not an auto-responder.
rfq.prepare.cards.2.title: First article
rfq.prepare.cards.2.desc: Sample production with full FAI report, CMM report and material certificate.
rfq.prepare.cards.3.title: Series production
rfq.prepare.cards.3.desc: 500–100,000 pieces, with in-process SPC and delivery to your agreed schedule.
rfq.certifications.label: Certifications
rfq.faq.label: Frequently asked questions
rfq.faq.0.q: How long does it take to get a quote?
rfq.faq.0.a: We aim to reply within 2 business days with either a quote, a quote timeline, or specific questions about your drawing. Complex assemblies or parts needing heat treatment may take a few days longer — we'll always tell you upfront.
rfq.faq.1.q: Do I have to upload a drawing to get a quote?
rfq.faq.1.a: No. You can submit the request without files and we'll follow up — but a 2D drawing with tolerances and a material spec lets us give you a far more accurate answer, faster.
rfq.faq.2.q: Can I get an NDA before sharing confidential files?
rfq.faq.2.a: Yes. Tick the NDA box in the form and we'll email you a mutual non-disclosure agreement first. We only ask for your drawings once it's signed.
rfq.faq.3.q: What series sizes do you quote?
rfq.faq.3.a: Our sweet spot is 500 to 100,000 pieces per order. We also quote prototypes as a preparatory stage before series — select "Prototype / sample only" in the batch size field.
rfq.form.success.heading: Request received
rfq.form.success.body: Thanks — your request is logged. An engineer from our sales team will reply within 2 business days. Keep this reference for your records:

rfq.form.company.label: Company name
rfq.form.country.label: Country
rfq.form.countryOther.label: Country (specify)

rfq.form.email.help: Please use your work email so we can verify your company.
rfq.form.email.error: Please enter a valid business email.
rfq.form.phone.label: Phone number
rfq.form.part.label: Part name or project reference
rfq.form.part.error: Please enter a part name or project reference.
rfq.form.industry.label: Industry
rfq.form.batch.label: Batch size per release
rfq.form.annualVolume.label: Estimated annual volume
rfq.form.targetDate.label: Target date for first delivery
rfq.form.services.label: Services required
rfq.form.services.error: Please select at least one service.
rfq.form.heatTreatment.notice.label: Heads-up:
rfq.form.heatTreatment.notice.body: Heat treatment is coordinated via a certified partner near our facility. This adds approximately 1–2 weeks to the standard lead time, but it is included in your quote as a fully managed service.
rfq.form.nda.notice.label: NDA workflow:
rfq.form.nda.notice.body: We'll email you a mutual NDA first. You can submit this request now without files — we'll request the drawings once the NDA is signed. You may still attach non-confidential files below.
rfq.form.dropzone.formats: STEP · IGES · PDF · ZIP — up to 50 MB
rfq.form.mobileNote.label: Using a phone?
rfq.form.mobileNote.body: Uploading CAD files works best from a desktop. You can submit this request now — we'll reply with a secure upload link, or email drawings to
rfq.form.nda.checkbox.label: Please send me a mutual NDA before I upload any drawings.
rfq.form.nda.checkbox.body: We'll email a mutual non-disclosure agreement first — no files need to leave your network before it's signed.
rfq.form.message.label: Message / notes
rfq.form.message.placeholder: Surface treatment, special inspection, packaging, target price…
rfq.form.message.help: Anything else we should know — surface treatment, special inspection, packaging, target price.
rfq.form.consent.body: I agree that Borela BT. may store and process my data to handle this request.
rfq.form.consent.error: Please accept the privacy notice to continue.
rfq.form.submit.note: You'll get an automatic confirmation, then an engineer's reply within 2 business days.
rfq.panel.process.label: [ — What happens next ]
rfq.panel.process.heading: From upload to first delivery
rfq.panel.process.0.title: Receipt confirmed
rfq.panel.process.0.desc: An automatic email with your reference number lands immediately.
rfq.panel.process.1.title: Engineering review
rfq.panel.process.1.desc: A real engineer checks feasibility and replies within 2 business days.
rfq.panel.process.2.title: Quote prepared
rfq.panel.process.2.desc: A detailed offer follows; parts needing heat treatment include partner coordination.
rfq.panel.process.3.title: Sample, then series
rfq.panel.process.3.desc: First article inspection, then series production of 500–100,000 pieces.
rfq.panel.response.label: [ — Response time ]
rfq.panel.response.body: …is our target for a real engineer's reply — not an auto-responder.
rfq.panel.data.label: [ — Your data is safe ]
rfq.panel.data.heading: Three commitments
rfq.panel.data.0.title: NDA on request.
rfq.panel.data.0.desc: Tick the NDA box and we send a mutual agreement before you upload anything.
rfq.panel.data.1.title: Encrypted transfer.
rfq.panel.data.1.desc: All files transit over HTTPS and are stored on EU servers only.
rfq.panel.data.2.title: GDPR compliant.
rfq.panel.data.2.desc: Your data is processed under EU law. Request deletion at any time.
